name: GPT-5
description:
GPT-5 is OpenAI's most advanced frontier model. It features exceptional reasoning, creative
writing capabilities, and deep world knowledge. It is highly steerable and maintains consistency
across very long conversations. Best for complex reasoning, nuanced storytelling, and
high-stakes intellectual tasks.
bestPractices:
- Use clear and detailed instructions.
- Provide examples (few-shot prompting) for specific formatting or style requirements.
- Use system prompts to establish a persona or specific constraints.

name: GPT-4o
description:
GPT-4o ("omni") is a versatile, high-performance model designed for speed and efficiency without
sacrificing intelligence. It excels at a wide range of tasks including coding, translation, and
general-purpose assistant duties. Best for real-time applications and tasks requiring a good
balance of intelligence and latency.
bestPractices:
- Direct and concise prompts often yield the best results for standard tasks.
- For complex tasks, break the prompt into logical steps.

name: GPT-4o mini
description:
GPT-4o mini is a highly cost-efficient, small-scale model designed for high-volume, low-latency
tasks. Despite its size, it remains highly capable for basic reasoning, summarization, and
simple text generation. Best for simple classifications, basic extraction, and high-frequency
automated tasks.
bestPractices:
- Keep prompts focused and avoid overly complex instructions.
- Ideal for tasks where cost is a primary concern.
